column1: # appimage catalog — apps installable via `appimage install -i` or `appimage install <name>`.
# Tab-separated columns:  name <TAB> source_url <TAB> guard <TAB> description
#   - guard: name of an appimage-guards/<guard>.sh hook, or "-" for none
#   - source_url is a GitHub repo/release URL (preferred, enables updates) or a
#   - lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored
# Keep columns tab-separated (not spaces). Every field must be non-empty (use
# "-" for no guard) — adjacent tabs collapse when parsed and would misalign.

column4: VS Code (official build, repackaged as an AppImage)
Claude Desktop (community Linux build; personal hosts only)
LM Studio (local LLM runner; personal hosts only)
